case_title: NATALYA FELDMAN VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELDMAN, NATALYA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $230.32 FILED BY FELDMAN, NATALYA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
